74023.subject: Charles Hoskinson: "Wave of Failures" is Coming to Cardano Ecosystem
74023.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These are our top stories today:

* **[Cardano's TapTools](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cardano-s-taptools-winding-down-is-a-symptom-of-a-shrinking-chain)**[ winds down as Hoskinson warns more ecosystem projects will fold](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cardano-s-taptools-winding-down-is-a-symptom-of-a-shrinking-chain)

* **[Sui](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-blames-triple-mainnet-halt-gas-charging-bug-known-risk-patch)**[ blames triple mainnet halt on gas-charging bug and risky patch](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-blames-triple-mainnet-halt-gas-charging-bug-known-risk-patch)

* **[Solana](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/solana-ships-native-payments-rail-for-subscriptions-and-allowances)**[ ships native payments rail for subscriptions and allowances](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/solana-ships-native-payments-rail-for-subscriptions-and-allowances)

* **[BlackRock BUIDL](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-s-buidl-pushed-avalanche-s-tokenized-asset-total-past-usd1-16b)**[ pushes Avalanche's tokenized-asset total past $1.16B](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/blackrock-s-buidl-pushed-avalanche-s-tokenized-asset-total-past-usd1-16b)

* **[Mastercard](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-opens-card-settlement-network-on-eight-blockchains-adding-weekend-and-holiday-cycles)**[ opens card settlement on 8 blockchains with weekend cycles](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-opens-card-settlement-network-on-eight-blockchains-adding-weekend-and-holiday-cycles)

It's been a brutal couple days for Layer 1s.

[TapTools](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/cardano-s-taptools-winding-down-is-a-symptom-of-a-shrinking-chain), the analytics platform that became the default front-end for the whole **Cardano ecosystem**, yesterday said it’s **winding down within two weeks**. Today, DEX aggregator SteelSwap followed with the same news. Worse, **Charles Hoskinson responded by warning that more Cardano projects will fold this year**. NFT marketplace [JPG.Store](https://JPG.Store) has shut down earlier, and the chain now sits **28th by TVL**.

Then there’s [Sui](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/sui-blames-triple-mainnet-halt-gas-charging-bug-known-risk-patch), which **halted its mainnet three times on May 28 and 29**. The post-mortem is unusually candid: an upgrade carried a bug that prompted two halts, and the third came from **a fix the team shipped knowing it carried halt risk**. They wanted the chain back fast. They got it back and then it broke again.

And [Zcash](https://www.cryptotimes.io/2026/06/03/zcash-activates-nu6-2-hard-fork-following-double-spend-risk-discovery/), which we didn't cover, so here's the catch-up: it pushed an emergency hard fork after a researcher found **a bug that could have enabled double-spends**. There were no funds lost and no evidence the bug was exploited but the fix made the chain tempo

74019.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-3rd-2026

Happy Wednesday friends!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.358T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $743.92
Gold: $4,447.30
Silver: $73.21
Oil (WTI): $95.77
US 10Y Treasury: 4.491%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 25
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
The Mantle/Bybit ecosystem continues to heat up good anons!
They have been achieving increasing success in the fintech sector via @UR_Global, in the RWA world and in tokenized stocks via @xStocksFi, in the crypto/AI space via @Infinit_Labs, are seeing continued growth of the Mantle defi ecosystem and @mETHProtocol, and making all sorts of moves in other areas as well!
Check out the most recent tweet from @benbybit below re: the above, and make sure to listen to the latest Mantle State Of Mind livestream below that!
And as always make sure to follow Mantle on Twitter/X for more updates [ https://substack.com/redirect/0093da94-1850-4551-b5e5-122bbf333115?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on all the cool things they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly red today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $1M TVL include Igra, MANTRA, and Canton. 
Protocols are also mostly red today. Best-performing protocols on the weekly with at least $1M TVL include multichain dex Bridgers, BSC/Solana derivatives protocol TurboFlow, and Canton dex Pool Party.

New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @novadotmarkets. Twitter bio states “The next billion-dollar market starts here. Powered by @HyperliquidX”. Followed by 73 of our mutuals. h/t @muarmemuar:
Top Stablecoin Yields
(note: these are the top Stablecoin Yields, sourced from @DefiLlama (single-exposure, no yield tokens, $5M+ TVL only) - note: these lists are just raw data, make sure to always DYOR before interacting with any/all protocols)
Important News And Analysis
-Prices down yet again, and Coinbase buys Ethena/$ENA token as the two announce new partnership, h/

74017.subject: Anthropic Expands Restricted Cybersecurity Program
74017.body:
Daily Pre-IPO Briefing

StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW85Wr8YpkprW8fjNTV1yv3bHW7jDgJ35PSPvwM7WCR63lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3lcW6szBw32bcP_4W7VGltx7NbQKPW6wgp2N3f7YVYW3Ms5z44cjVfDW7j060f4yVHJ6W2kjfzF5XbMb_W7WSs356-6bq6W6lJkcd4bqk_MW6dGdGJ5TP18fW9k-HjR5lFZpnV-hSwq6J15ggW3pkZzg6D0B51N2FDxZ2bjXTYW3tyLk05G1pZlW8Y_TRV2TD47DW226xdw2Z9GmgN59LFqjG3tHTN7hVVqkpXksBW34wZlV80KmsSN5rCdD-BL0vgN1DwN2w3snD8W108gwk543_mTd9RcrP04 )

Daily Pre-IPO Briefing (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW85Wr8YpkprW8fjNTV1yv3bHW7jDgJ35PSPvwM7WCR63lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3lcW6szBw32bcP_4W7VGltx7NbQKPW6wgp2N3f7YVYW3Ms5z44cjVfDW7j060f4yVHJ6W2kjfzF5XbMb_W7WSs356-6bq6W6lJkcd4bqk_MW6dGdGJ5TP18fW9k-HjR5lFZpnV-hSwq6J15ggW3pkZzg6D0B51N2FDxZ2bjXTYW3tyLk05G1pZlW8Y_TRV2TD47DW226xdw2Z9GmgN59LFqjG3tHTN7hVVqkpXksBW34wZlV80KmsSN5rCdD-BL0vgN1DwN2w3snD8W108gwk543_mTd9RcrP04 )

Hi Oleg,

We all know the top story in the private markets right now: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX (all StartEngine Private (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VW85Wr8YpkprW8fjNTV1yv3bHW7jDgJ35PSPvwM7WCR63lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3lcW6szBw32bcP_4W7VGltx7NbQKPW6wgp2N3f7YVYW3Ms5z44cjVfDW7j060f4yVHJ6W2kjfzF5XbMb_W7WSs356-6bq6W6lJkcd4bqk_MW6dGdGJ5TP18fW9k-HjR5lFZpnV-hSwq6J15ggW3pkZzg6D0B51N2FDxZ2bjXTYW3tyLk05G1pZlW8Y_TRV2TD47DW226xdw2Z9GmgN59LFqjG3tHTN7hVVqkpXksBW34wZlV80KmsSN5rCdD-BL0vgN1DwN2w3snD8W108gwk543_mTd9RcrP04 ) alums) are planning potentially market-moving IPOs.¹

But in today’s Daily Pre-IPO Briefing, we wanted to highlight some other notable headlines beyond these pending public debuts:

- Anthropic expanded access to Project Glasswing by adding an additional 150 partners in over 15 countries. About 200 organizations worldwide are now testing Mythos, Anthropic's cybersecurity AI model for identifying software vulnerabilities in codebases.²
- Kraken is preparing to launch the first CFTC-regulated perpetual futures contracts in the U.S. within the next 30 days. Hailed as the “lifeblood of crypto liquidity,” global crypto perpetual swaps generated $60T in trading volume In 2025 alone.³
- Lambda Labs closed an oversubscribed $1B senior credit facility, with JPMorgan serving as the lead arranger. Lambda will use the funding to deploy the latest generation of NVIDIA's AI hardware and expand its data center capacity.⁴

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. This report does not imply specific results for investors with exposure to these companies via StartEngine Private. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Additionally, there's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for these companies, or that they will be profitable.

IPOs may capture the spotlight. But behind the scenes, private companies continue launching products, expanding infrastructure, reaching new milestones, and opening new markets.

We'll keep tracking the daily headlines that could shape tomorrow's

74015.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Blockchain Association, former security officials urge Senate to pass Clarity Act
74015.body:
Cardano's Charles Hoskinson warns of 'wave of failures' after TapTools wind-down | Mastercard expands stablecoin settlement options with USDC, PYUSD and RLUSD | Kraken to offer tokenized US IPO access for global retail investors via xStocks | Binance winds down centralized NFT service, gives users one month to withdraw assets |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *Bitcoin* slipped below $66,000 this morning as analysts pointed ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403454/bitcoin-dips-below-66000?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) to heavy ETF outflows, Middle East tensions, and lingering fallout from *Strategy's* *BTC* sale.

In today's newsletter, former national security and law enforcement officials urge the *Senate* to pass the *Clarity Act* , *Cardano's Charles Hoskinson* warns of a "wave of failures," *Mastercard* expands its stablecoin settlement options, and more.

Meanwhile, *Sen. Lummis* said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403539/sen-lummis-jpmorgan-ceo-jamie-dimon-hasnt-read-clarity-act-remarks-distasteful?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *JPMorgan* CEO *Jamie Dimon* hasn't read the *Clarity Act* , calling his recent remarks about *Coinbase* CEO *Brian Armstrong* "distasteful."

Plus, *Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent* backed ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403563/bessent-backs-summer-push-clarity-act-bitcoin-reserve-moving-deliberate-speed?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) a summer push for passage of the *Clarity Act* , adding that the department is moving at a "deliberate speed" to establish a strategic *bitcoin* reserve.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🏛️ Blockchain Association urges Senate to pass Clarity Act with letter from 160 former security officials*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/403450/blockchain-association-letter-senate?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

The *Blockchain Association* urged the *Senate* to pass the *Clarity Act* , backing its push with a letter signed by 160 former national security and law enforcement officials.

* The former officials argued the bill would strengthen law enforcement capabilities and improve ef

Привіт
Oleh,

*****************************************************************

Відправлення за відправленням, рік за роком - ви були там. Для людей, які на вас розраховують.

Padala. 家. Pix. Parivar. Рідні. Bendición. Hashar. Naija. Parce. ოჯახი. Otbasy. Bhalobasha. Mi gente. Близкие. Gurbet. Ашар. Acasă. Меҳр. Rodzina. Pavula. Ailə. Dor. Տուն.

І багато іншого. Різні слова для однієї дії.

А під ним - інфраструктура, яку ми побудували, щоб кожен літак міг приземлитися. Майже десять років. Надійно. З упевненістю, яка вам потрібна.

Дякуємо за кожну посилку додому. Не зупиняйся. Гроші рухаються.

74013.subject: Ethereum Breaks. Saylor Blinks.
74013.body:
----------
_**Your Weekly Deep Dive into The World of Crypto**_

**June 3, 2026 · ****5 Min Read**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dddf2f20-4042-4b28-b237-fd6d7f5b23aa/image.png?t=1780466800)

## 📡** THIS WEEK IN CRYPTO**

**GM, Readers!**

This week, crypto and the rest of the market filed for divorce. The S&P 500 hit its 19th all-time high of 2026, the Dow crossed 51,000, and Bitcoin slid to $67,000.

Spot Bitcoin ETFs hit a record 10-day outflow streak. Ether ETFs ran 14 and counting. Ether broke $2,000. And a U.S. court order forced Circle to freeze $12.6M of stablecoins inside an Ethereum privacy protocol.

_The AI trade is having a great year. Crypto is having a week._

_**Let's get into it…**_

# 🐋 THE BIG WHALE MOVES

### **1. ****Ethereum's Worst Week of 2026**

Ether broke below $2,000 on May 28 for the first time since late March, capping a brutal stretch that has now wiped 32% off ETH's year-to-date gains. Spot Ether ETFs extended their losing streak past 14 sessions, draining hundreds of millions, while the ETH/BTC ratio kept sliding.

The Ethereum Foundation also lost two more high-profile researchers, Carl Beekhuizen and Julian Ma, deepening the talent-flight narrative. The one bright spot: BitMine, Tom Lee's corporate buyer, kept hoovering up ETH, lifting its stash above $11 billion. Conviction is still there, just not in the price.

_**Meanwhile, Bitcoin saw its own corporate headline:**_ Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) sold 32 BTC (around $2.5M) for the first time since 2022, as mentioned in a[ June 1 filing](https://assets.contentstack.io/v3/assets/bltf8d808d9b8cebd37/blt01aedf36c9f1b5b3/6a1cdb95487e7818fe49dd85/form-8-k_06-01-2026.pdf), to fund preferred stock dividends, a symbolic break from the "never sell" playbook.

### **2. ****Circle Drops the Freeze Button on $12.6M**

On May 30, USDC issuer Circle blacklisted the smart contract behind Zama's confidential USDC (cUSDC) wrapper, freezing roughly $12.6 million inside. The trigger was a federal court order tied to a class-action against Overnight Finance, whose founder allegedly moved $15.77M from the treasury and parked $12.4M in Zama's pool on May 11.
